title: Handelia trichophylla
taxonomy: Handelia trichophylla is a plant species classified within the family Apiaceae. It belongs to the order Apiales. Further classification places it in the family Apiaceae, subfamily Apioideae, and tribe Apieae. Handelia trichophylla is native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. More research may be needed to confirm its complete taxonomic classification.
